title: [lichen_l2.c:911] lichen_l2_iface_init no error return
description: Function: lichen_l2_iface_init. Contract violation: The function has void return type but can fail in multiple ways (LoRa init, EUI-64 retrieval, link addr set). It sets iface_init_failed flag internally but callers (NET_DEVICE_INIT) cannot detect failure. Zephyr's net_if_api.init is defined as void, so this is by design, but downstream operations (send, enable) must check iface_init_failed to avoid operating on half-initialized state. The implementation correctly does this (lines 539, 649), so this is documented behavior, not a bug. Priority 3 - design observation only.
close_reason: Documented: Zephyr's net_if_api.init callback mandates void return. Error handling via iface_init_failed atomic flag is correct; added @note documenting this design constraint.
